# FERC Audit Explorer

> Machine-readable findings of noncompliance and staff recommendations mined from **utility audit and prudence records**, across three collections: **FERC audits** (the Office of Enforcement's financial (FA) and non-financial (PA) audits of utilities, ISOs/RTOs, and pipelines, electric/gas/oil), **FERC prudence reviews** (rate-case cost determinations), and **state PUC/PSC/SCC audits** (rate, fuel-cost, and management proceedings from several state commissions). FERC audits and the parsed state management audits are broken into findings -> recommendations (verbatim); legal orders, testimony, and settlements are listed with their source. Themes are mined by transparent keyword tagging, never LLM judgement.

Scope: FERC utility audits — electric, gas & oil, extended to prudence reviews and state audits. As of 2026-06-07, the corpus holds 265 structured records: 120 FERC audits (of 120 listed at https://www.ferc.gov/audits (217 electric, 23 gas, 18 oil identified)), 14 prudence reviews, and 131 state PUC audits. Findings and recommendations are quoted verbatim. Independent public-interest tool, not affiliated with FERC. Links below are relative to the site root.

## Data (machine-readable)
- [Reports](data/reports.json): every structured record with findings, recommendations, and themes
- [Patterns](data/patterns.json): cross-report themes with counts by industry and year
- [Patterns by collection](data/patterns_by_collection.json): the same aggregates, per collection/tab
- [Meta](data/meta.json): corpus counts and provenance
- [Full corpus text](llms-full.txt): all findings, recommendations, and source notes in one file (verbatim)
- [LLM context](llms-ctx.txt): the same corpus in the llms.txt XML context shape (`<project>`/`<doc>`)

## FERC Audits
_120 document(s), 2014–2025. 599 findings / 1505 recommendations parsed from 120 report(s). top themes: Form reporting (Form No. 1/2/6, Page 700), Accounting misclassification, Depreciation, Below-the-line costs (lobbying, charitable, etc.)._

- [Kern River Gas Transmission Company](https://elibrary.ferc.gov/eLibrary/filelist?accession_number=20250929-3000&optimized=false): Docket FA23-10-000, issued 2025-09-29, financial audit, n/a, 5 finding(s) — findings: Renewable Natural Gas Quality Specifications; Tariff Administration and Oversight; Informational Postings; Allowance for Funds Used During Construction; Annual Membership Dues

reconciliation petition (1), general rate case final order (1), rate case decision (1), rate case advice letter (1), power cost update order (1), winter-storm cost investigation stipulation (1), final order on nuclear cost recovery (1), final order on fuel cost recovery (1), order on gas supply contract buyout cost recovery (1), decision (1), hearing transcript (1), rider petition (1), performance investigation final decision (1), rate design investigation decision (1), order on gas cost hedge agreement (denied) (1), rate case notice (1), general rate case filing (1). top themes: Affiliate / intercompany transactions._

- [Nevada Power Company d/b/a NV Energy](https://pucweb1.state.nv.us/PUC2/Dktinfo.aspx?Util=Electric): NV · rate case notice, Docket 25-02016, issued n/a — listed for reference
- [Entergy Arkansas, LLC](https://apps.apsc.arkansas.gov/olsv2/Docket_Search_Documents.asp?Docket=16-036-FR&DocNumVal=1107): AR · direct testimony, Docket 16-036-FR, issued n/a — listed for reference
- [The Empire District Electric Company d/b/a Liberty](https://efis.psc.mo.gov/Case/Display/85589): MO · direct testimony, Docket ER-2024-0261, issued n/a — listed for reference
- [The Empire District Electric Company d/b/a Liberty](https://efis.psc.mo.gov/Case/Display/85589): MO · direct testimony, Docket ER-2024-0261, issued n/a — listed for reference
- [New York State Electric & Gas Corporation](https://dps.ny.gov/pending-and-recent-electric-rate-cases): NY · rate case summary, Docket 25-E-0375, issued n/a — listed for reference
- [Consolidated Edison Company of New York, Inc.](https://dps.ny.gov/pending-and-recent-electric-rate-cases): NY · rate case summary, Docket 25-E-0072, issued n/a — listed for reference
- [Northern States Power Company d/b/a Xcel Energy](https://www.psc.nd.gov/public/cases/): ND · direct testimony, Docket PU-24-376, issued n/a — listed for reference
- [Kingsport Power Company d/b/a AEP Appalachian Power](https://www.tn.gov/tpuc.html): TN · general rate case filing, Docket 21-00107, issued n/a — listed for reference
- [Southern California Edison Company](https://www.cpuc.ca.gov/industries-and-topics/electrical-energy/electric-costs/what-is-an-energy-resource-recovery-account-proceeding): CA · ERRA reasonableness/prudence decision, Docket D.06-01-007, issued n/a — listed for reference
- [San Diego Gas & Electric Company](https://www.cpuc.ca.gov/industries-and-topics/electrical-energy/electric-costs/what-is-an-energy-resource-recovery-account-proceeding): CA · ERRA reasonableness/prudence decision, Docket A.02-12-028, issued n/a — listed for reference

## Common themes (from parsed findings)
- Form reporting (Form No. 1/2/6, Page 700) — Errors or omissions in the annual FERC forms utilities file. (68 report(s), 183 finding(s))
- Accounting misclassification — Costs or revenues booked to the wrong FERC account. (67 report(s), 191 finding(s))
- Depreciation — Unapproved or incorrect depreciation rates applied to plant. (40 report(s), 62 finding(s))
- Below-the-line costs (lobbying, charitable, etc.) — Non-recoverable costs (lobbying, charity, ads) charged to ratepayers. (40 report(s), 53 finding(s))
- Property & plant records — Incomplete or inaccurate utility plant and property records. (36 report(s), 63 finding(s))
- AFUDC / cost of capital — Mis-stated AFUDC — the financing cost capitalized during construction. (35 report(s), 46 finding(s))
- Affiliate / intercompany transactions — Transactions with affiliated companies mis-priced or mis-reported. (26 report(s), 37 finding(s))
- Cost of service & rates — Errors in rate-base or return inputs to cost-of-service rates. (23 report(s), 46 finding(s))
- Capitalization vs. expense — Costs capitalized that should be expensed, or the reverse. (19 report(s), 20 finding(s))
- Tariff administration & oversight — Not following the utility's own FERC-approved tariff. (18 report(s), 27 finding(s))
- Membership dues & industry associations — Trade-association dues (e.g., EEI) improperly charged to ratepayers. (11 report(s), 11 finding(s))
- Informational postings — Required public postings (e.g., OASIS) missing, late, or incomplete. (9 report(s), 15 finding(s))
- Creditworthiness — Customer credit standards not applied as the tariff requires. (1 report(s), 1 finding(s))

## Optional
- [Human-readable explorer](index.html)
- [FERC audit reports (primary source)](https://www.ferc.gov/audits)
